text_excerpt: News - South Cotswolds Liberal Democrats Skip to main content South Cotswolds Liberal Democrats Meet the team Health Survey News Dr. Roz Savage Campaigns Volunteer Donate Join Donate Join Campaigns Roz Savage survey Cirencester Hospital Save our NHS Fix our Roads News South Cotswolds South Cotswolds Liberal Democrats Celebrate Historic Election Victories The Liberal Democrats in the South Cotswolds have achieved a historic result in the recent local elections, securing control of both Gloucestershire County Council and Wiltshire Council for the first time. 2 Jun 2025 View Sign up for email updates...
